def positive_tokenizer_loaded_per_request():
    rule_id = "tokenizer_loaded_per_request"
    family = "mlops"
    severity = "warning"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Tokenizers are loaded on request paths instead of once during application startup."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
